title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Independent Server Trial
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a valid focused agent skill with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.instruction:

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-portable-contract-1bf02c: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Portable Contract into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-portable-contract-1bf02c:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

stimulus.title: Portable Contract failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Portable Contract condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Portable Contract applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.
